name: minecraft-codex-skills
description: A multi-host Minecraft Java and Bedrock development skills bundle for Codex, Claude Code, and compatible agent hosts, with image-generation workflows when the host supports them.

interface.shortDescription: Reusable Minecraft Java and Bedrock development and operations skills, plus host-supported image-generation workflows.
interface.longDescription: Bundle modding, plugin-dev, datapack, commands, testing, CI/CD, world generation, resource pack, Java-to-Bedrock pack conversion, Java and Bedrock server admin, permissions, crossplay, WorldEdit ops, and EssentialsX ops skills in one installable package, with image-generation workflows available when the host exposes image tools.
defaultPrompt: Use Minecraft Codex Skills to scaffold a NeoForge 1.21.11 mod with data generation.
Use Minecraft Codex Skills to plan Bedrock Dedicated Server access, pack deployment, and backup operations.
Use Minecraft Codex Skills to convert a Java resource pack into a Bedrock .mcpack with a conversion report.
Use Minecraft Codex Skills to generate pack art or concept textures for a resource-pack update.
